These fonts are test fixtures for watermark shaping and embedding tests.

- `Inter-Bold.ttf`: Inter, licensed under the SIL Open Font License 1.1.
- `NotoSansArabic-Bold.ttf`: Noto Sans Arabic, licensed under the SIL Open Font License 1.1.

They are used only by tests so the public repository does not depend on the
private macOS app bundle layout.
